name: Construct Mapping review for Ssr Assessment Stakes Boundaries bundle
summary: Accepted. The bundle distinguishes response origin, label source, real-response comparator, assessment purpose, decision consequence, and workflow role; it does not collapse synthetic-response realism, generated labels, formative feedback inputs, or automated scorer validity into one construct.

findings.claim_or_issue: The claim combines contextual assessment guidance with direct synthetic-response studies.
findings.why_it_matters: Contextual guidance can define use boundaries, but direct study findings must carry any empirical synthetic-response claims.
findings.recommended_action: Keep support_role values as boundary_condition for guidance sources and direct_support only for synthetic-response studies.
